mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS siteId, s.code AS siteCode, s.name AS siteName, s.color AS color, s.enabled AS enabled, t.id AS lastTaskId, t.status AS lastTaskStatus, t.finished_at AS lastTaskFinishedAt, t.fetched_count AS lastTaskFetchedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM novel n WHERE n.site_id = s.id) AS novelCount FROM site s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.* FROM crawl_task t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT site_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM crawl_task GROUP BY site_id ) t2 ON t1.site_id = t2.site_id AND t1.id = t2.max_id ) t ON t.site_id = s.id ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC
SELECT site_id AS siteId, COUNT(*) AS failureCount FROM crawl_task WHERE status = 'failed' AND finished_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(3), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY site_id
